changelog: LITE MODE — REWRITTEN CORRECTLY. Reverted the v1.44.19–23 mistake of building a parallel flat UI in ui.lite.*. Lite now uses the SAME Pro UI tree (same home screen, same sidebars, same menu, same drilldown screens) — it just strips the heavy effects:
• Ken Burns hero zooms (8 home hero layers + sports hero) → static zoomed image
• Auto-cycling hero rotation (Discovery 12 s + Sports 8 s) → first item only, no timer
• Streaming-service watermark pulse (alpha + scale 6 s loop) → static
• TopNavBar 'NEW' badge alpha pulse → full alpha, no breathing
• Discovery hero AnimatedContent crossfade between posters → instant swap
• Sports hero AnimatedContent crossfade → no crossfade

PRO IS UNCHANGED — every gate defaults to existing Pro behaviour. The CompositionLocal LocalIsLiteMode is `false` in Pro and the original infinite-repeating tweens run with bit-for-bit identical params (initialValue, targetValue, durationMillis, easing, repeatMode).
TOGGLE — Settings → APP MODE now reads the current mode and shows the OPPOSITE option as the action ('Switch to Lite' when in Pro, 'Switch to Pro' when in Lite). One tap, no relaunch.
DELETED — LiteShellScreen.kt and LiteComponents.kt (the bad parallel UI). Kept LiteFirstLaunchDialog.kt and AppMode.kt (correct).
